zh.lifeSummary: 當William Barnes於1453年出生在英國肯特維也時，他的父親Baron John Bowrey Barnes37歲，母親Margaret Jermyn29歲。他於1475年與Bennetta Lewknor 13th ggm在英國英格蘭肯特維也結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1479年11月27日在英國肯特波斯特林享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Barnes于1453年出生在英国肯特維也时，他的父亲Baron John Bowrey Barnes37岁，母亲Margaret Jermyn29岁。他于1475年与Bennetta Lewknor 13th ggm在英国英格兰肯特維也结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1479年11月27日在英国肯特波斯特林享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Barnes (on the Surrey bank of the Thames in London), named with Old English bere-ærn ‘barn, a storehouse for barley and other grain’, or a topographic name or metonymic occupational name for someone who lived by or worked at a barn or barns, from Middle English barn ‘barn, granary’.

English: variant of Barne, with excrescent -s, derived from either the Middle English personal name Bern, Barn (based on the Scandinavian personal name Biǫrn or Old English Beorn, both from a word meaning ‘warrior’), or from Middle English barn (Old Norse barn) ‘child’. The latter term is found as a byname for men of the upper classes; it might also have had the meaning ‘young man of a prominent family’, like Middle English child (see Child ).
Irish: in Ireland in many cases this is no doubt the English name, but in others it is possibly an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Bearáin ‘descendant of Bearán’, a byname meaning ‘spear’.

variants.name: Barrington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Barrington. The one in Gloucestershire is named with the Old English personal name Beorn + -ing- denoting association + tūn ‘settlement’. The Somerset placename is of Norman origin, and is probably derived from Barentin in Seine-Maritime, France. The first element of the Cambridgeshire example is the genitive form of an unattested Old English personal name Bāra.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Bearáin, ‘descendant of Bearán’ (see Barnes 3 and Barron ).

variants.name: Barns
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Barnes   1-3.

variants.name: Child
meanings: nickname from Middle English child ‘child, infant’ (Old English cild), in various possible applications. The word is found in Old English as a byname, and in Middle English as a widely used affectionate term of address. It was also used as a term of status for a young man of noble birth, although the exact meaning is not clear; in the 13th and 14th centuries it was a technical term used of a young noble awaiting elevation to the knighthood. In other cases it may have been applied as a byname to a youth considerably younger than his brothers or to one who was a minor on the death of his father.
in Kent, possibly a topographic name from Old English cielde ‘spring (water)’, a rare word derived from c(e)ald ‘cold’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Barnes was born in 1453, in Wye, Kent, England, his father, Baron John Bowrey Barnes, was 37 and his mother, Margaret Jermyn, was 29. He married Bennetta Lewknor 13th ggm in 1475, in Wye, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 27 November 1479, in Postling, Kent, England, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Barnes est né en 1453, à Wye, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Baron John Bowrey Barnes, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Jermyn, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Bennetta Lewknor 13th ggm en 1475, à Wye, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 27 novembre 1479, à Postling, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Barnes 1453 in Wye, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron John Bowrey Barnes 37 und seine Mutter Margaret Jermyn 29. Er hat 1475 in Wye, Kent, England, United Kingdom Bennetta Lewknor 13th ggm geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. November 1479 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Postling, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Barnes è nato il nel 1453 nel Wye, Kent, England, il suo padre, Baron John Bowrey Barnes, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Jermyn, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Bennetta Lewknor 13th ggm nel 1475, nel Wye, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 novembre 1479, nel Postling, Kent, England, all'età di 26 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Barnes(이)가 1453년 영국 켄트 윈예에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron John Bowrey Barnes(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Jermyn(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 윈예에서 Bennetta Lewknor 13th ggm(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1479년 11월 27일 영국 켄트 포스틀링에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Barnes nasceu em 1453, em Wye, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baron John Bowrey Barnes, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Jermyn, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Bennetta Lewknor 13th ggm em 1475, em Wye, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de novembro de 1479, em Postling, Kent, Inglaterra, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Barnes родился в 1453 г. в местности ви, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Baron John Bowrey Barnes было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Jermyn, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Bennetta Lewknor 13th ggm в 1475 г. в местности ви, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 27 ноября 1479 г. в местности постлинг, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Barnes nació en 1453, en Wye, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Baron John Bowrey Barnes, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Margaret Jermyn, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Bennetta Lewknor 13th ggm en 1475, en Wye, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de noviembre de 1479, en Postling, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 26 años.
